extortion.description: As the largest practice of its kind in the United States, New York Plastic Surgical Group, a Division of Long Island Plastic Surgical Group is among the most well-established plastic surgery practices in the nation. Founded in 1948, New York Plastic Surgical Group offers compassionate and comprehensive care through the collective medical experience of its specialty-trained surgeons. The doctors of NYPSG a is well known specialists across the world and one of the best in US.
